item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-028","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答按落地页目标和核心指标直接划分市场部/产品部 owner，并给出清晰组织责任分工。未套用 agentic system、控制边界或 WAE 式术语分析部门职责，符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep 预期。"}
